name: Azamina Determination
name_jp: アザミナ・ハマルティア
desc: Reveal 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck, and for every 4 Levels it has (round down), shuffle 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your GY and/or banishment into the Deck, then Special Summon the revealed monster. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Sinful Spoils" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it, but it cannot be activated this turn. You can only use 1 "Azamina Determination" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Reveal 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck, and for every 4 Levels it has (round down), shuffle 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your GY and/or banishment into the Deck, then Special Summon the revealed monster. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Sinful Spoils" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it, but it cannot be activated this turn. You can only use 1 "Azamina Determination" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Reveals cards from your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Fusion Summon
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
